title: Geospatial Data Lineage & Provenance Tracking
description: Automated origin tracking, transformation audit trails, compliance mapping, and Python pipeline integration for spatial data infrastructure.

sections.title: Geospatial Lineage Fundamentals & Architecture
sections.summary: Architecture, provenance models, transformation logging, scoping rules, stewardship, trust boundaries, compliance framework mapping.

sections.title: Python Automation & Pipeline Integration
sections.summary: Workflow hooks, async logging, hash generation, metadata injection — embedding provenance directly in Python spatial ETL.

sections.title: Storage, Indexing & Query Optimization
sections.summary: Graph databases, PostGIS schema design, WORM retention, JSON/XML lineage documents, and query patterns for production-scale provenance graphs.

sections.title: Regulatory Compliance & Standards Mapping
sections.summary: Map GDPR, FISMA, INSPIRE, ISO 19115, and OGC controls to concrete spatial lineage fields — with control-to-field tables and Python validation.
